layer_A_algebraic.matrix_levels: id_n⊗ψ is *-hom if ψ is; SOS preserved all n

layer_B_Cstar_extension.reason: ψ is a proper (non-auto) unital *-endomorphism of the polynomial Weyl algebra. Algebraic positivity is automatic; continuous CP extension to a C* completion of Weyl/CCR algebra is not constructed and not ruled out in this probe.

non_claims: No CP map on a C* algebra constructed
